question: Which attributes are reasons to choose Amazon EC2? (Select TWO.)

choices.text: Ability to run any type of workload
AWS management of operating system (OS) patches
Complete control of computing resources
Ability to run serverless applications
AWS management of operating system (OS) security

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ A: Ability to run any type of workload, C: Complete control of computing resources

question: What are the benefits of using an Amazon Machine Image (AMI)? (Select THREE.)

choices.text: Using an AMI as a server backup for Amazon EC2 instances
Launching instances with the same configuration
Migrating data from on premises to Amazon EC2 instances
Updating systems by patching their AMI
Automating security group settings for instances
Selling or sharing software solutions packaged as an AMI

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ A: Using an AMI as a server backup for Amazon EC2 instances, B: Launching instances with the same configuration, F: Selling or sharing software solutions packaged as an AMI

question: A system administrator must change the instance types of multiple running Amazon EC2 instances. The instances were launched with a mix of Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) backed Amazon Machine Images (AMIs) and instance-store-backed AMIs. Which method is a valid way to change the instance type?

choices.text: Stop an instance-store-backed instance, change its instance type, and start the instance.
Stop an Amazon EBS backed instance, change its instance type, and start the instance.
Change the instance type of an instance-store-backed instance without stopping it.
Change the instance type of an Amazon EBS backed instance without stopping it.

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ B: Stop an Amazon EBS backed instance, change its instance type, and start the instance.

question: A workload requires high read/write access to large local datasets. Which instance types would perform BEST for this workload? (Select TWO.)

choices.text: Memory optimized
Compute optimized
Storage optimized
General purpose
Accelerated computing

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ A: Memory optimized, C: Storage optimized

question: An application requires the media access control (MAC) address of the host Amazon EC2 instance. The architecture uses an AWS Auto Scaling group to dynamically launch and terminate instances. What is the BEST way for the application to obtain the MAC address? • Write the MAC address in the application configuration file of each instance.

choices.text: Write the MAC address in the application configuration file of each instance.
Include the MAC address in a custom AMI for each instance in the AWS Auto Scaling group.
Include the MAC address in the Amazon Machine Image (AMI) that is used to launch all of the instances in the AWS Auto Scaling group.
Use the user data of each instance to access the MAC address through the instance metadata.

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ D: Use the user data of each instance to access the MAC address through the instance metadata.

question: Which statements about user data are correct? (Select TWO.)

choices.text: User data cannot be run while the instance is stopped.
By default, user data runs after every instance restart.
By default, user data runs only once, when an instance is launched.
, The cloud architect must remove the config_user_scripts file to rerun the user data scripts.
The cloud architect must run the /var/lib/cloud/instance/scripts/part-001 command for the user data script to run again.

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ C: By default, user data runs only once, when an instance is launched., E: The cloud architect must run the /var/lib/cloud/instance/scripts/part-001 command for the user data script to run again.

question: A transactional workload on an Amazon EC2 instance performs high amounts of frequent read and write operations. Which Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume type is BEST for this workload?

choices.text: Provisioned IOPS solid state drive (SSD)
Cold hard disk drive (HDD)
General Purpose solid state drive (SSD)
Throughput Optimized hard disk drive (HDD)

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ A: Provisioned IOPS solid state drive (SSD)

question: It is possible to create an NFS share on an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) backed Linux instance by installing and configuring an NFS server on the instance. In this way, multiple Linux systems can share the file system of that instance. Which advantages does Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) provide compared to this solution? (Select TWO.) • High availability

choices.text: High availability
Automatic scaling
No need for backups
File locking
Strong consistency

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ A: High availability, B: Automatic scaling

question: Which feature does Amazon FSx for Windows File Server provide?

choices.text: Amazon management agent for Windows file servers
Microsoft Active Directory server for Windows file servers
Backup solution for on-premises Windows file servers
Fully managed Windows file servers

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ D: Fully managed Windows file servers

question: Which descriptions of Amazon EC2 pricing options are correct? (Select TWO.)

choices.text: Reserved Instances are physical servers that are reserved exclusively for customer use.
Dedicated Hosts are servers that are dedicated to one purpose, such as a firewall.
Spot Instances offer spare compute capacity at discounted prices and can be interrupted.
With On-Demand Instances, customers can pay for compute capacity by usage time with no long-term commitments.
Savings Plans are budgeting tools that help customers manage Amazon EC2 costs.

explanation: คำตอบที่ถูกต้องคือ C: Spot Instances offer spare compute capacity at discounted prices and can be interrupted., D: With On-Demand Instances, customers can pay for compute capacity by usage time with no long-term commitments.
